2161.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Sirin that he said: 'I said to 'Abida: Tell me about the grandfather's share of inheritance. He said: "I have memorized eighty differing rulings on the grandfather."'
2161.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Sirin bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku berkata kepada 'Abidah: Ceritakanlah kepadaku tentang bagian waris kakek. Ia berkata: "Aku telah menghafal delapan puluh pendapat yang berbeda-beda tentang kakek."'

2162.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayd ibn 'Amr that a man came to Ali (may Allah be pleased with him) and asked him about an inheritance case. He said: 'If it does not involve a grandfather, bring it to me.'
2162.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubaid ibn 'Amr bahwa seorang laki-laki datang kepada Ali (radhiyallahu 'anhu) dan bertanya tentang suatu perkara warisan. Ia berkata: 'Jika tidak melibatkan kakek, bawa saja kepadaku.'

2163.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayd ibn 'Amr that he said: 'A man came to Ali (may Allah be pleased with him) and asked him about an inheritance case. He said: "If it does not involve a grandfather, bring it to me."'
2163.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubaid ibn 'Amr bahwa ia berkata: 'Seorang laki-laki datang kepada Ali (radhiyallahu 'anhu) dan bertanya tentang suatu perkara warisan. Ia berkata: "Jika tidak melibatkan kakek, bawa saja kepadaku."'

2164.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sa'id ibn Jubayr, from a man of (the tribe of) Murad, that he heard Ali (may Allah be pleased with him) say: 'Whoever wishes to plunge into the pits of Hell, let him rule on (cases involving) the grandfather and brothers.'
2164.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sa'id ibn Jubair, dari seorang laki-laki dari (suku) Murad, bahwa ia mendengar Ali (radhiyallahu 'anhu) berkata: 'Barangsiapa ingin terjun ke lubang-lubang neraka Jahannam, maka hendaklah ia memutuskan perkara (yang melibatkan) kakek dan saudara-saudara.'

2165.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Sa'id al-Khudri (may Allah be pleased with him) and from 'Ikrima that Abu Bakr al-Siddiq (may Allah be pleased with him) treated the grandfather as a father (in matters of inheritance).
2165.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Sa'id al-Khudri (radhiyallahu 'anhu) dan dari 'Ikrimah bahwa Abu Bakr al-Shiddiq (radhiyallahu 'anhu) menjadikan kakek berkedudukan seperti ayah (dalam masalah warisan).

2166.iwh_en: It was narrated from Kurdus, from Abu Musa (al-Ash'ari, may Allah be pleased with him), that Abu Bakr (may Allah be pleased with him) treated the grandfather as a father (in matters of inheritance).
2166.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Kurdus, dari Abu Musa (al-Asy'ari, radhiyallahu 'anhu), bahwa Abu Bakr (radhiyallahu 'anhu) menjadikan kakek berkedudukan seperti ayah (dalam masalah warisan).

2167.iwh_en: It was narrated from Marwan, from Uthman (may Allah be pleased with him), that Abu Bakr (may Allah be pleased with him) used to treat the grandfather as a father (in matters of inheritance).
2167.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Marwan, dari Utsman (radhiyallahu 'anhu), bahwa Abu Bakr (radhiyallahu 'anhu) biasa menjadikan kakek berkedudukan seperti ayah (dalam masalah warisan).

2168.iwh_en: It was narrated from Uthman (may Allah be pleased with him) that Abu Bakr (may Allah be pleased with him) used to treat the grandfather as a father (in matters of inheritance).
2168.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Utsman (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Abu Bakr (radhiyallahu 'anhu) biasa menjadikan kakek berkedudukan seperti ayah (dalam masalah warisan).

2169.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Burda that he said: 'I met Marwan ibn al-Hakam in Medina. He said: O son of Abu Musa, have I not been informed that (in your view) the grandfather is not given the position of a father, yet you do not deny it? I said: Even if you yourself did not deny it...'
2169.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Burda bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku bertemu Marwan ibn al-Hakam di Madinah. Ia berkata: Wahai putra Abu Musa, bukankah aku telah diberi tahu bahwa (menurut pendapat kalian) kakek tidak didudukkan pada posisi ayah, sementara kamu tidak mengingkarinya? Aku berkata: Sekalipun kamu sendiri tidak mengingkarinya...'

2170.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Nadra and from 'Ikrima, from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him), that Abu Bakr (may Allah be pleased with him) used to treat the grandfather as a father (in matters of inheritance).
2170.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Nadhrah dan dari 'Ikrimah, dari Ibn Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhu), bahwa Abu Bakr (radhiyallahu 'anhu) biasa menjadikan kakek berkedudukan seperti ayah (dalam masalah warisan).

2171.iwh_en: It was narrated from 'Ikrima, from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him), that he said: 'The one (Abu Bakr) whom the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said of: "If I were to take anyone as a close friend, I would have taken him as my close friend, but the brotherhood of Islam is better" — that is, Abu Bakr — treated the grandfather as a father.'
2171.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari 'Ikrimah, dari Ibn Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhu), bahwa ia berkata: 'Orang yang disebut oleh Rasulullah ﷺ: "Seandainya aku mengambil seseorang sebagai kekasih (khalil), sungguh aku akan menjadikannya khalilku, tetapi ukhuwah Islam lebih utama" — yakni Abu Bakr — menjadikan kakek berkedudukan seperti ayah.'

2172.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abi Mulayka, from Ibn al-Zubayr, that Abu Bakr (may Allah be pleased with him) treated the grandfather as a father (in matters of inheritance).
2172.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Abi Mulaika, dari Ibn al-Zubair, bahwa Abu Bakr (radhiyallahu 'anhu) menjadikan kakek berkedudukan seperti ayah (dalam masalah warisan).

2173.iwh_en: It was narrated from al-Hasan (al-Basri) that he said: 'The Sunnah concerning the grandfather has been established, and Abu Bakr (may Allah be pleased with him) treated the grandfather as a father — but the people became confused about it.'
2173.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari al-Hasan (al-Bashri) bahwa ia berkata: 'Sunnah mengenai kakek telah ditetapkan, dan Abu Bakr (radhiyallahu 'anhu) menjadikan kakek berkedudukan seperti ayah — namun orang-orang menjadi bingung tentangnya.'

2174.iwh_en: It was narrated from al-Sha'bi that he said: 'The first grandfather to inherit in Islam was Umar (may Allah be pleased with him).'
2174.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari al-Sya'bi bahwa ia berkata: 'Kakek pertama yang mewarisi dalam Islam adalah Umar (radhiyallahu 'anhu).'

2175.iwh_en: It was narrated from al-Sha'bi that he said: 'The first grandfather to inherit in Islam was Umar (may Allah be pleased with him). He took all the estate, but Ali and Zayd (may Allah be pleased with them both) came to him and said: You are not entitled to that — you are merely like one of the two brothers.'
2175.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari al-Sya'bi bahwa ia berkata: 'Kakek pertama yang mewarisi dalam Islam adalah Umar (radhiyallahu 'anhu). Ia mengambil seluruh harta, tetapi Ali dan Zaid (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) datang kepadanya dan berkata: Engkau tidak berhak atas itu — engkau hanyalah seperti salah satu dari dua bersaudara.'

2176.iwh_en: It was narrated from al-Sha'bi that he said: 'Umar (may Allah be pleased with him) used to divide the grandfather's share equally with a brother or two brothers. If they were more than two, he gave the grandfather a third. And with descendants (children), he gave the grandfather a sixth.'
2176.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari al-Sya'bi bahwa ia berkata: 'Umar (radhiyallahu 'anhu) biasa membagi bagian kakek secara merata dengan satu atau dua saudara. Jika mereka lebih dari dua, ia memberi kakek sepertiga. Dan bersama keturunan (anak-anak), ia memberi kakek seperenam.'

2177.iwh_en: It was narrated from Marwan ibn al-Hakam that when Umar ibn al-Khattab (may Allah be pleased with him) was stabbed, he consulted the companions about the grandfather's share. He said: 'I had formed a view about the grandfather — if you see fit to follow it, then follow it.' Uthman said to him...
2177.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Marwan ibn al-Hakam bahwa ketika Umar ibn al-Khatthab (radhiyallahu 'anhu) ditikam, ia bermusyawarah dengan para sahabat tentang bagian waris kakek. Ia berkata: 'Aku telah memiliki pendapat tentang kakek — jika kalian memandang baik untuk mengikutinya, ikutilah.' Utsman berkata kepadanya...'

2178.iwh_en: It was narrated from al-Sha'bi that he said: 'Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him) wrote to Ali (may Allah be pleased with him) — while Ibn Abbas was in Basra — saying: I was brought a case of a grandfather and six brothers. Ali wrote back to him: "Give the grandfather a sixth, and do not give anyone after him."'
2178.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari al-Sya'bi bahwa ia berkata: 'Ibn Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhu) menulis surat kepada Ali (radhiyallahu 'anhu) — sementara Ibn Abbas berada di Basra — dengan mengatakan: Aku dihadapkan pada perkara kakek dan enam saudara. Ali membalas suratnya: "Berikan kakek seperenam, dan jangan berikan kepada siapapun setelahnya."'

2179.iwh_en: It was narrated from al-Sha'bi regarding a case of six brothers and a grandfather: 'Give the grandfather a sixth.' Abu Muhammad (al-Darimi) said: It seems he means the ruling of Ali (may Allah be pleased with him) — al-Sha'bi narrates it from Ali (may Allah be pleased with him).
2179.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari al-Sya'bi tentang perkara enam saudara dan kakek: 'Berikan kakek seperenam.' Abu Muhammad (al-Darimi) berkata: Tampaknya ia maksudkan pendapat Ali (radhiyallahu 'anhu) — al-Sya'bi meriwayatkannya dari Ali (radhiyallahu 'anhu).

2180.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abdullah ibn Salama that Ali (may Allah be pleased with him) used to treat the grandfather as a brother — up to the point when he becomes the sixth (heir, at which he takes a sixth).
2180.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abdullah ibn Salamah bahwa Ali (radhiyallahu 'anhu) biasa menjadikan kakek seperti saudara — hingga ia menjadi yang keenam (ahli waris, di mana ia mendapat seperenam).

2181.iwh_en: It was narrated from al-Hasan (al-Basri) that Ali (may Allah be pleased with him) used to share the grandfather's inheritance together with the brothers down to a minimum of a sixth.
2181.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari al-Hasan (al-Bashri) bahwa Ali (radhiyallahu 'anhu) biasa membagikan warisan kakek bersama saudara-saudara hingga minimal seperenam.

2182.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abdullah ibn Salama that Ali (may Allah be pleased with him) used to share equally between the grandfather and the brothers until the grandfather's share reached a sixth.
2182.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abdullah ibn Salamah bahwa Ali (radhiyallahu 'anhu) biasa membagi secara merata antara kakek dan saudara-saudara hingga bagian kakek mencapai seperenam.

2183.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibrahim that Ali (may Allah be pleased with him) used to share the grandfather's inheritance equally with the brothers up to six (heirs). He gave each person with a fixed share their prescribed portion. He did not give a uterine brother or uterine sister an inheritance alongside a grandfather. And he did not increase the grandfather's share beyond a sixth when there were descendants — except where the equal division would give him more than that.
2183.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibrahim bahwa Ali (radhiyallahu 'anhu) biasa membagi warisan kakek secara merata bersama saudara-saudara hingga enam (ahli waris). Ia memberi setiap pemilik bagian tetap jatah mereka. Ia tidak memberi saudara seibu atau saudari seibu warisan bersama kakek. Dan ia tidak menambah bagian kakek melebihi seperenam ketika ada keturunan — kecuali jika pembagian merata memberinya lebih dari itu.

2184.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abd al-Rahman ibn Ma'qil that Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him) was asked about the grandfather. He said: 'Which ancestor of yours is greatest?' I (the narrator) said: Adam. He said: 'Have you not heard the words of Allah Most High: "O Children of Adam" — meaning that Adam is called a grandfather (father) of all?'
2184.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abd al-Rahman ibn Ma'qil bahwa Ibn Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhu) ditanya tentang kakek. Ia berkata: 'Leluhurmu yang mana yang paling besar?' Aku (perawi) menjawab: Adam. Ia berkata: 'Tidakkah kamu mendengar firman Allah Ta'ala: "Wahai Bani Adam" — yang artinya Adam disebut kakek (ayah) bagi semua?'

2185.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'I wish that those who differ from me regarding the grandfather and I would invoke mutual imprecation — to see which of us holds the worse position.'
2185.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku ingin bahwa aku dan orang-orang yang berbeda pendapat denganku mengenai kakek saling ber-mula'anah — untuk melihat siapa di antara kami yang berpendapat lebih buruk.'

2186.iwh_en: It was narrated from Tawus, from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him), that he treated the grandfather as a father (in matters of inheritance).
2186.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Thawus, dari Ibn Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhu), bahwa ia menjadikan kakek berkedudukan seperti ayah (dalam masalah warisan).

2187.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Ishaq that he said: 'I entered upon Shurayh while with him were 'Amir, Ibrahim, and 'Abd al-Rahman ibn 'Abd Allah — concerning the inheritance case of a woman from us, al-'Aliya, who died leaving her husband, her mother, her paternal brother, and her grandfather. He said to me: Is there a sister? I said: No. He said...'
2187.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Ishaq bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku masuk menemui Syuraih sementara bersamanya ada 'Amir, Ibrahim, dan 'Abd al-Rahman ibn 'Abd Allah — mengenai perkara warisan seorang perempuan dari kami, al-'Aliyah, yang meninggal dunia dan meninggalkan suami, ibu, saudara seayah, dan kakek. Ia berkata kepadaku: Apakah ada saudari? Aku berkata: Tidak. Ia berkata...'

2188.iwh_en: It was narrated from al-Hasan (al-Basri) that Zayd (ibn Thabit, may Allah be pleased with him) used to share the grandfather's inheritance with the brothers down to a minimum of a third.
2188.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari al-Hasan (al-Bashri) bahwa Zaid (ibn Tsabit, radhiyallahu 'anhu) biasa membagikan warisan kakek bersama saudara-saudara hingga minimal sepertiga.

2189.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibrahim, from Zayd ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him), that he used to divide the grandfather's share equally with the brothers down to a minimum of a third — and would not reduce it below that.
2189.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibrahim, dari Zaid ibn Tsabit (radhiyallahu 'anhu), bahwa ia biasa membagi bagian kakek secara merata bersama saudara-saudara hingga minimal sepertiga — dan tidak menguranginya di bawah itu.

2190.iwh_en: It was narrated from Isma'il that he said: 'Amir (al-Sha'bi) said: "In the matter of the grandfather, take what the people have agreed upon." Abu Muhammad (al-Darimi) said: He means the ruling of Zayd (ibn Thabit).'
2190.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ismail bahwa ia berkata: 'Amir (al-Sya'bi) berkata: "Dalam masalah kakek, ambillah apa yang telah disepakati oleh orang-orang." Abu Muhammad (al-Darimi) berkata: Ia maksudkan pendapat Zaid (ibn Tsabit).'

2191.iwh_en: It was narrated from Qatada that Zayd ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) said in the case of a sister, a mother, a husband, and a grandfather: 'He divided it into twenty-seven shares: the mother gets six, the husband gets nine, the grandfather gets eight, and the sister gets four.'
2191.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Qatadah bahwa Zaid ibn Tsabit (radhiyallahu 'anhu) berkata dalam perkara saudari, ibu, suami, dan kakek: 'Ia membaginya menjadi dua puluh tujuh bagian: ibu mendapat enam, suami mendapat sembilan, kakek mendapat delapan, dan saudari mendapat empat.'

2192.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Sirin, from Ibn Mas'ud (may Allah be pleased with him), that he said: 'The first grandmother to be given a share in Islam was a paternal grandmother while her son was still alive.'
2192.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Sirin, dari Ibn Mas'ud (radhiyallahu 'anhu), bahwa ia berkata: 'Nenek pertama yang diberi bagian waris dalam Islam adalah nenek dari pihak ayah sementara putranya masih hidup.'

2193.iwh_en: It was narrated from Tawus, from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him), that the Prophet ﷺ gave a grandmother a sixth.
2193.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Thawus, dari Ibn Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhu), bahwa Nabi ﷺ memberi seorang nenek seperenam.

2194.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sa'id ibn al-Musayyib that Umar (may Allah be pleased with him) gave a grandmother an inheritance share while her son was still alive.
2194.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sa'id ibn al-Musayyib bahwa Umar (radhiyallahu 'anhu) memberikan bagian warisan kepada seorang nenek sementara putranya masih hidup.

2195.iwh_en: It was narrated from Mansur ibn al-Mu'tamir, from Ibrahim, that he said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ gave three grandmothers a sixth.' I (the narrator) said to Ibrahim: Who were they? He said: 'Your two grandmothers on your father's side and your grandmother on your mother's side.'
2195.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Manshur ibn al-Mu'tamir, dari Ibrahim, bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ memberi tiga nenek seperenam.' Aku (perawi) berkata kepada Ibrahim: Siapakah mereka? Ia berkata: 'Kedua nenekmu dari pihak ayah dan nenekmu dari pihak ibu.'

2196.iwh_en: It was narrated from al-Hasan (al-Basri) that he said: 'A grandmother inherits even while her son is still alive.'
2196.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari al-Hasan (al-Bashri) bahwa ia berkata: 'Seorang nenek mewarisi meskipun putranya masih hidup.'

2197.iwh_en: It was narrated from al-Sha'bi that he said: 'The mother of a maternal grandfather does not inherit, for her own son — through whom she establishes kinship — does not inherit. How then can she inherit?'
2197.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari al-Sya'bi bahwa ia berkata: 'Ibu dari kakek pihak ibu tidak mewarisi, karena putranya sendiri — yang melaluinya ia menjalin hubungan kekerabatan — tidak mewarisi. Bagaimana mungkin ia bisa mewarisi?'

2198.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu al-Dahma', from 'Imran ibn Husayn (may Allah be pleased with him), that he said: 'A grandmother inherits even while her son is still alive.'
2198.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu al-Dahma', dari 'Imran ibn Hushain (radhiyallahu 'anhu), bahwa ia berkata: 'Seorang nenek mewarisi meskipun putranya masih hidup.'

2199.iwh_en: It was narrated from al-Zuhri that he said: 'A grandmother — whether a paternal grandmother or a maternal grandmother — came to Abu Bakr (may Allah be pleased with him) and said: My grandson or granddaughter has died, and I have been informed that I have a share. What is my share? Abu Bakr said: I have not heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ say...'
2199.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari al-Zuhri bahwa ia berkata: 'Seorang nenek — baik nenek dari pihak ayah maupun dari pihak ibu — datang kepada Abu Bakr (radhiyallahu 'anhu) dan berkata: Cucu laki-laki atau cucu perempuanku telah meninggal dunia, dan aku diberitahu bahwa aku memiliki bagian. Apa bagianku? Abu Bakr berkata: Aku tidak pernah mendengar Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda...'

2200.iwh_en: It was narrated from al-Sha'bi, from Ali and Zayd (may Allah be pleased with them both), that they said: 'If the grandmothers are of equal degree, three grandmothers inherit: the two grandmothers of the father — his mother's mother and his father's mother — and the grandmother of the mother. But if one of them is closer, the share goes to those of closer kinship.'
2200.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari al-Sya'bi, dari Ali dan Zaid (radhiyallahu 'anhuma), bahwa keduanya berkata: 'Jika para nenek berada pada derajat yang sama, tiga nenek mewarisi: dua nenek dari pihak ayah — ibu dari ibunya dan ibu dari ayahnya — dan nenek dari pihak ibu. Namun jika salah satunya lebih dekat, bagian itu menjadi milik yang memiliki hubungan lebih dekat.'

2201.iwh_en: It was narrated from al-Sha'bi, from Ali and Zayd (may Allah be pleased with them both), that they did not give a paternal grandmother an inheritance share when the father was still alive.
2201.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari al-Sya'bi, dari Ali dan Zaid (radhiyallahu 'anhuma), bahwa keduanya tidak memberikan bagian warisan kepada nenek dari pihak ayah ketika ayah masih hidup.

2202.iwh_en: It was narrated from al-Zuhri that Uthman (may Allah be pleased with him) used not to give a grandmother an inheritance share while her son was still alive.
2202.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari al-Zuhri bahwa Utsman (radhiyallahu 'anhu) tidak biasa memberikan bagian warisan kepada nenek ketika putranya masih hidup.

2203.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Sirin, from Ibn Mas'ud (may Allah be pleased with him), that he said: 'Grandmothers have no rightful inheritance share — what they receive is merely a provision (ta'ma) that has been given to them. And grandmothers, whether closer or more distant, are equal (in their share).'
2203.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Sirin, dari Ibn Mas'ud (radhiyallahu 'anhu), bahwa ia berkata: 'Para nenek tidak memiliki hak waris yang sesungguhnya — apa yang mereka terima hanyalah pemberian (ta'mah) yang telah diberikan kepada mereka. Dan para nenek, baik yang lebih dekat maupun yang lebih jauh, adalah sama (dalam bagiannya).'

2204.iwh_en: It was narrated from al-Mughira, from Ibrahim, that 'Abdullah (ibn Mas'ud, may Allah be pleased with him) said: 'A grandmother inherits even while her son is still alive.'
2204.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari al-Mughirah, dari Ibrahim, bahwa Abdullah (ibn Mas'ud, radhiyallahu 'anhu) berkata: 'Seorang nenek mewarisi meskipun putranya masih hidup.'

2205.iwh_en: It was narrated from al-Sha'bi that he said: 'Four grandmothers came together before Masruq. He excluded the mother of the paternal grandfather and gave inheritance to three: the two grandmothers of the father — his mother's mother and his father's mother — and the grandmother of the mother.'
2205.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari al-Sya'bi bahwa ia berkata: 'Empat nenek datang bersama-sama kepada Masruq. Ia mengecualikan ibu dari kakek pihak ayah dan memberikan warisan kepada tiga: dua nenek dari pihak ayah — ibu dari ibunya dan ibu dari ayahnya — dan nenek dari pihak ibu.'

2206.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibrahim, from Abdullah (ibn Mas'ud, may Allah be pleased with him), regarding a daughter and a granddaughter, that he said: 'The daughter gets half and the granddaughter gets a sixth, and what remains is returned (rad) to the daughter.'
2206.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibrahim, dari Abdullah (ibn Mas'ud, radhiyallahu 'anhu), tentang anak perempuan dan cucu perempuan, bahwa ia berkata: 'Anak perempuan mendapat separuh dan cucu perempuan mendapat seperenam, dan sisa dikembalikan (rad) kepada anak perempuan.'

2207.iwh_en: It was narrated from Alqama, from Abdullah (ibn Mas'ud, may Allah be pleased with him), that he was brought a case of uterine brothers and a mother. He gave the uterine brothers a third and gave the mother the rest of the estate. And he said: 'The mother is the residual heir of whoever has no residual heir.'
2207.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Alqamah, dari Abdullah (ibn Mas'ud, radhiyallahu 'anhu), bahwa ia dihadapkan pada perkara saudara-saudara seibu dan ibu. Ia memberi saudara-saudara seibu sepertiga dan memberi ibu sisa harta. Dan ia berkata: 'Ibu adalah ahli waris 'ashabah bagi siapapun yang tidak memiliki ahli waris 'ashabah.'

2208.iwh_en: It was narrated from al-Sha'bi that a man asked him about a man who died and left his daughter — no other heir was known for him. He said: 'She gets all the estate.'
2208.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari al-Sya'bi bahwa seorang laki-laki bertanya kepadanya tentang seorang laki-laki yang meninggal dunia dan meninggalkan anak perempuannya — tidak diketahui ahli waris lain baginya. Ia berkata: 'Ia mendapatkan seluruh harta.'

2209.iwh_en: It was narrated from al-Sha'bi that Ibn Mas'ud (may Allah be pleased with him) used not to return (rad) the remainder to a uterine brother when there was a mother, nor to a grandmother when there were other heirs with fixed shares alongside her, nor to a granddaughter alongside a daughter, nor to a wife or husband.
2209.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari al-Sya'bi bahwa Ibn Mas'ud (radhiyallahu 'anhu) tidak biasa mengembalikan (rad) sisa harta kepada saudara seibu ketika ada ibu, juga tidak kepada nenek ketika ada ahli waris lain dengan bagian tetap bersamanya, tidak kepada cucu perempuan bersama anak perempuan, dan tidak kepada istri maupun suami.

2210.iwh_en: It was narrated that Ali (may Allah be pleased with him) used to return (rad) the remainder to every heir with a fixed share — except the husband and wife.
2210.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa Ali (radhiyallahu 'anhu) biasa mengembalikan (rad) sisa harta kepada setiap ahli waris yang memiliki bagian tetap — kecuali suami dan istri.
